<!--
Thanks for contributing! 🚀
Fill out the sections below so reviewers can understand and validate your change quickly.
-->

## 📝 Summary

<!-- A short description of what this PR does and why. -->

## 🏷️ Type of change

- [ ] ✨ `feat` - new feature
- [ ] 🐛 `fix` - bug fix
- [ ] 📚 `docs` - documentation
- [ ] ♻️ `refactor` - code change, no new feature / no fix
- [ ] 🚀 `perf` - performance improvement
- [ ] 🧪 `test` - add or fix tests
- [ ] 🧹 `chore` - tooling, config, CI, deps

## 🔗 Related issues

<!-- Use "Closes #123" to auto-close. -->
Closes #

## ✅ Checklist

- [ ] Commits follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/)
- [ ] Code builds locally without warnings (`dotnet build`)
- [ ] Tests added / updated where relevant
- [ ] Fluent UI components used correctly - no inline styles or hex colors
- [ ] PWA offline capability not broken
- [ ] Documentation updated (README, AGENTS.md) if behavior or conventions changed

## 📸 Screenshots / demo

<!-- Drag & drop images or recordings for UI changes. -->

## 💬 Notes for reviewers

<!-- Anything non-obvious, trade-offs, follow-ups you want called out. -->
